intro:
Mangalore (Mangaluru) is Karnataka's premier port city and a major hub for trade, education, and coastal commerce along the Arabian Sea. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 860+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Mangalore.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Mangalore's coastal topography and busy port-related logistics require vendors with specialised local knowledge. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Mangalore. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Mangalore?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹4,000. 2 BHK typically ₹6,000 – ₹12,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Mangalore?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Mangalore and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
